posts.title: I Made Claude Prove its hallucination
posts.description: I stopped using 1 clever model and built a local multi-agent debugging workflow that had to earn every answer before I trusted it.

posts.title: Indexes Don’t Make Databases Fast
posts.description: What I learned the hard way is simple. Most read-scaling pain starts with the wrong lookup path, not the wrong database.
